entity.summary: Sui-based decentralized exchange combining classic constant-product pools, concentrated-liquidity pools, aggregated routing, liquidity farming, and token-locking surfaces under one protocol identity.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates SuiDex V2, V3, routing, pools, farms, and VICTORY-token locking into one exchange entity. Current first-party trading and pool interfaces remain reachable, and independent metrics report non-zero Sui TVL.

evidence.title: SuiDex official exchange application and pool guide
evidence.notes: First-party guide identifies SuiDex as a Sui DEX combining V2 AMM, V3 concentrated liquidity, aggregated routing, liquidity provision, and VICTORY rewards.

evidence.title: SuiDex protocol profile and TVL
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile reports non-zero Sui TVL and identifies the AMM, farming, and token-locking surfaces, supporting active status.
